Package org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class DpeName

java.lang.Object
org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.DpeName
All Implemented Interfaces:
ErsapName
public class DpeName extends Object implements ErsapName
The name of a ERSAP DPE.

The canonical name for a DPE has the following structure: 

 <host_address>_<language>
 <host_address>%<port>_<language>
Example: 
 10.1.1.1_java

  • Constructor Details

    • DpeName

      public DpeName(String host, ErsapLang lang)
      Identify a DPE with host and language. The default port will be used.
      Parameters:
      host - the host address where the DPE is running
      lang - the language of the DPE

    • DpeName

      public DpeName(String host, int port, ErsapLang lang)
      Identify a DPE with host, port and language.
      Parameters:
      host - the host address where the DPE is running
      port - the port used by the DPE
      lang - the language of the DPE

    • DpeName

      public DpeName(String canonicalName)
      Identify a DPE with a canonical name.
      Parameters:
      canonicalName - the canonical name of the DPE

      public String canonicalName()
      Description copied from interface: ErsapName
      Returns the canonical name of this ERSAP component.

      canonicalName in interface ErsapName
      Returns:
      a string with the canonical name

    • name

      public String name()
      Description copied from interface: ErsapName
      Returns the specific name of this ERSAP component. This is the last part of the canonical name.
      Specified by:
      name in interface ErsapName
      Returns:
      a string with the name part of the canonical name
